title: Kodaiyila Lyrics Cuckoo Song Lyrics
singerName: Kalyani Nair, Pradeep Kumar, Vaikom Vijayalakshmi
stanzas:
Song: Kodaiyila
Singer(s): Vaikom Vijayalakshmi, Kalyani Nair, Pradeep Kumar
Lyricist: Yuga Bharathi
Music: Santhosh Narayanan
Movie: Cuckoo (2014)

Kodayila mazha pola, ennuyira nee irukka.
Vaadayilum analaaga, veruven un kooda.
Kalayilan gadhiraaga, kannaruge ne irukka
malai varum nilavaagi thoduven kaathoda.

Pona senmathula senja thavam idhuvo.
innum kodi senmam kooda varum uravo.(2)

Kaariyam nooru seidhu
mannil vazhvadhu peridhu illai.
undhan kaaladi thadam arindhu
sellum padhaigal mudivadhillai.

Aalayam thaedi sendru
siyyum poojaigal thaevaillai.
Undhan kai viral thodum pozhudhu
thunbam tholaivilum varudhadhillai.

Uruvedhu vadivedhuvo
konda uravugal unarndhu thoda.
iruledhu oliyedhuvo
rendu irudhayam kalandhuvida.

Maaridum yaavumendru sollum
vaarthaiyil nesamum illai.
Unmai kadhalai porutha mattil
endha maattramum nigalvadhillai.

Aasaigal theerumattum kollum
anbinil azhagu illai.
vendhu pogira velayilum
anbu thee endrum alivadhillai.

Uruvedhu vadivedhuvo
konda uravugal unarndhu thoda.
iruledhu oliyedhuvo
rendu irudhayam kalandhuvida.

Kodayila mazha pola, ennuyira nee irukka.
Vaadayilum analaaga, veruven un kooda.
Kalayilan gadhiraaga, kannaruge ne irukka
malai varum nilavaagi thoduven kaathoda.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kodaiyila?

The song captures themes of love and longing, evoking a sense of romance and melancholy.

Who are the singers of Kodaiyila?

The song is sung by Kalyani Nair, Pradeep Kumar, and Vaikom Vijayalakshmi.

Who composed the music for the movie Cuckoo?

The music for Cuckoo was composed by Santhosh Narayanan.

What is the context of the song in the movie Cuckoo?

The song is set in a romantic context, highlighting the deep emotional connection between the characters.

When was the song Kodaiyila released?

The song was released in 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kodaiyila from the movie Cuckoo is a beautiful melody that explores themes of love and longing. Sung by Kalyani Nair, Pradeep Kumar, and Vaikom Vijayalakshmi, it captures the emotional depth of the characters' relationship. Santhosh Narayanan's music adds a soothing and melancholic touch, while Yugabharathi's lyrics poetically express the yearning and connection between the lovers. This track evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance, making it a memorable piece in the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kodaiyila from the movie Cuckoo, where the soulful voices of Kalyani Nair, Pradeep Kumar, and Vaikom Vijayalakshmi blend seamlessly with Santhosh Narayanan's mesmerizing music. This song captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully penned by Yugabharathi. Dive into a world of emotions with this unforgettable track.
stanzaMeanings: Like rain in summer, you are my life. Even in drought, I will be with you like fire. In the morning, you are near my eyes, I will touch you like the moon with the breeze.
Is this the result of the penance from my past life? Will this relationship continue for many more lives?
Doing a hundred tasks and living on earth is not great. The paths that follow your footsteps never end.
There is no need for rituals in temples. When your fingers touch mine, no sorrow comes near.
Feel the relationships that have form and shape. Let two hearts unite, whether in darkness or light.
There is no love in words that say everything will change. In true love, no change is permanent.
There is no beauty in love that ends when desires are fulfilled. Even when burning, love's fire never dies.
Feel the relationships that have form and shape. Let two hearts unite, whether in darkness or light.
Like rain in summer, you are my life. Even in drought, I will be with you like fire. In the morning, you are near my eyes, I will touch you like the moon with the breeze.
Is this the result of the penance from my past life? Will this relationship continue for many more lives?
